_why: Knowledge orchestration policy for Open WebUI RAG pipeline. Defines when to retrieve, how to rank, how to cite, and when to fall back to model knowledge.

retrieval.why: top_k=5 with score floor 0.65 balances recall against noise injection. Chunks of 512 tokens fit comfortably within the 65K context budget even when 5 are injected simultaneously.

priority_why: Loaded collections are curated and domain-specific — highest signal. Model knowledge is broad but may be stale. Web search is last resort: incurs extra RPM charge and latency.

freshness.why: Chunks older than 1 year in fast-moving domains (LLMs, cloud APIs, frameworks) are likely outdated. Prefer live web search for those domains.

token_budget.why: 5 chunks × 512 tokens = 2560 tokens minimum. 5120 allows for full chunks with overlap. Never exceeds 12% of 65K ceiling.
